query:

('Tip World Records', '/images/partners/TipWorldRecords.jpg', 'https://www.tiprecords.com', true, 5, NOW(), NOW()),
('TesseracT Studio', '/images/partners/TesseracTstudio.jpg', 'https://www.tesseractstudio.com', true, 6, NOW(), NOW()),
